title: OrmoyoUtil
body:
This is a set of tools that I created for my own mods. Other mods can still use this.

 

The features included in this library are as the following:


**Abilities (Not related to the Minecraft player ability system):**
Abilities are contained inside players and can be used for anything to do with the player.



**Custom TTF/OTF Fonts:**
You can use your own TTF/OTF fonts to render in your GUI.


**Easier Network Messages:**
A small set of tools to make networking easier.
